source_pr.title: statistics: rewrite unlock stats handler
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/46351

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
- Rewrote unlock stats handler
- Used `exec.ExecuteInternal` instead of `h.execRestrictedSQL`
- Added `updateStatsAndUnlockTable` to reuse code.
- Added tests for `RemoveIfTableLocked` and `LockTableIndexOf`

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The case does not include a concrete flaky failure signature; the only explicit signal is enabling the race detector for the Bazel target (`race = "on"`).
failure_signature: No concrete failure signature captured (only Bazel `race = "on"` change for the statistics handle target).
root_cause_explanation: The patch rewrites the unlock stats handler and adds/adjusts tests, plus configures the Bazel target to run under the race detector. Without an actual failure log or a patch change that clearly targets a specific flaky mechanism, it is not safe to classify this as a concrete root cause beyond needing more evidence.
fix_pattern: Rewrite handler/tests and enable running the Bazel target under the race detector; no specific flaky root cause is evidenced in the case.
analysis:
PR title: statistics: rewrite unlock stats handler
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/46478
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (7): executor/lockstats/lock_stats_executor.go, statistics/handle/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/statslock/stats_lcok_test.go, statistics/handle/lock_stats_handler.go, statistics/handle/lock_stats_handler_test.go, statistics/handle/unlock_stats_handler.go, statistics/handle/update.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
